LanguageData.VFES_PlayerSettlement.description: Ein sEinkaufszentrum Versteck für Gangmitglieder und Kriminelle.
LanguageData.VFES_PlayerSettlement.label: Neues Versteck
LanguageData.SettlerCivil.description:
Diese Menschen leben seit Jahrzehnten oder Jahrhunderten hier und haben den Großteil der Technologie verloren, die sie auf diese Welt gebracht hat. Sie sind mehr als in der Lage, sich mit einfachen Schießpulverwaffen zu verteidigen, während sie ihrer Alltagsroutine nachgehen, nämlich Vieh hüten, Chemshine trinken und Kopfgelder jagen.

Sie beschäftigen sich mit den praktischen Angelegenheiten des Handels, des Vertrauens und des Überlebens.

Diese besondere Gruppe legt großen Wert auf ziviles Verhalten.
LanguageData.SettlerCivil.label: zivile Siedler
LanguageData.SettlerRough.description:
Diese Menschen leben seit Jahrzehnten oder Jahrhunderten hier und haben den Großteil der Technologie verloren, die sie auf diese Welt gebracht hat. Sie sind mehr als in der Lage, sich mit einfachen Schießpulverwaffen zu verteidigen, während sie ihrer täglichen Routine nachgehen, nämlich Vieh hüten, Chemshine trinken und Kopfgelder jagen.

Sie kümmern sich nicht um die praktischen Angelegenheiten von Handel und Vertrauen.

Diese besondere Gruppe glaubt, dass niemand gleich geschaffen ist und nur Stärke es einem ermöglicht, an der Grenze zu überleben.
LanguageData.SettlerRough.label: raue Siedler
LanguageData.SettlerSavage.description: Diese Menschen leben seit Jahrzehnten oder Jahrhunderten hier und haben den Großteil der Technologie verloren, die sie auf diese Welt gebracht hat. Sie sind eine lockere Konföderation von Banditenbanden, die sich darauf geeinigt haben, hauptsächlich Außenstehende zu bekämpfen, anstatt sich gegenseitig zu bekämpfen.\n\nBanditen säen nicht, sie bauen nicht und sie handeln selten. Angetrieben von einer Blut- und Ehrenkultur, die persönliche Stärke und Rücksichtslosigkeit schätzt, bereichern sie sich, indem sie ihre produktiveren Nachbarn überfallen und ausrauben.
LanguageData.SettlerSavage.label: Banditen
LanguageData.GR_RoamingMonstrosities.description: Die Wirkung jahrhundertelanger genetischer Experimente läuft Amok. Horden gefräßiger, wahnsinniger genetischer Aberrationen sind eine Bedrohung für jeden auf diesem Planeten.
LanguageData.GR_RoamingMonstrosities.label: umherstreifende Monstrositäten
LanguageData.VFEE_Deserters.description: Eine organisierte Gruppe kaiserlicher Deserteure, die beschlossen, die Organisation des Imperiums aktiv zu stören.
LanguageData.VFEE_Deserters.label: Deserteure
LanguageData.VFEE_NewFamily.label: Neue Familie
LanguageData.VFED_NewSafehaven.label: Neuer sicherer Hafen
LanguageData.VFET_WildMen.description: Eine vom Spieler kontrollierte Versammlung wilder Männer.
LanguageData.VFET_WildMen.label: wilde Männer
LanguageData.AM_EnemyPirate.label: Piratenräuber
LanguageData.AM_PlayerColony.description: Arme Plünderer, die ein unterirdisches sicheres Haus gefunden haben.
LanguageData.AM_PlayerColony.label: Sicheres Haus
LanguageData.VFEM2_CivilClan.description:
These clanmen have been here for a long time. Perhaps their ancestors crashed here a thousand years ago, as their legends suggest. In any case, the nordmen are fierce people who live off of the work of others, and they are not afraid to use force to take what's not theirs.

Albeit not as technologically advanced as other factions, the nordmen can be a valuable ally and a terrible enemy due to their hardiness and savage, heathen ways.

This particular clan is more progressive than others, and is more likely to engage in trade and diplomacy with other factions.
LanguageData.VFEM2_CivilClan.label: civil clan
LanguageData.VFEM2_ClanRough.description:
These clanmen have been here for a long time. Perhaps their ancestors crashed here a thousand years ago, as their legends suggest. In any case, the nordmen are fierce people who live off of the work of others, and they are not afraid to use force to take what's not theirs.

Albeit not as technologically advanced as other factions, the nordmen can be a valuable ally and a terrible enemy due to their hardiness and savage, heathen ways.

This particular clan values warlike dominance; it may be difficult to turn them into an ally.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ClanRough.label: rough clan
LanguageData.VFEM2_ClanSavage.description:
These clanmen have been here for a long time. Perhaps their ancestors crashed here a thousand years ago, as their legends suggest. In any case, the nordmen are fierce people who live off of the work of others, and they are not afraid to use force to take what's not theirs.

Albeit not as technologically advanced as other factions, the nordmen can be a valuable ally and a terrible enemy due to their hardiness and savage, heathen ways.

This particular clan wreaks havoc in surrounding settlements and takes any survivors into slavery - it will be impossible to become their ally!
LanguageData.VFEM2_ClanSavage.label: savage clan
LanguageData.VFEM2_KingdomCivil.description:
These people have been here for a shorter period of time than their neolithic bretheren. It is believed that some tribespeople and outlanders had come to embrace the medieval ways of life and decided to unite.

Though still technologically inferior to many other factions, the subjects of this kingdom are well-known for using towering fortifications to protect their assets, as well as adopting the use of shields in combat and fighting in a particularly orderly manner.

This particular kingdom is open to keeping trade relations good with other settlements to bolster their economic position.
LanguageData.VFEM2_KingdomCivil.label: civil kingdom
LanguageData.VFEM2_KingdomRough.description:
These people have been here for a shorter period of time than their neolithic bretheren. It is believed that some tribespeople and outlanders had come to embrace the medieval ways of life and decided to unite.

Though still technologically inferior to many other factions, the subjects of this kingdom are well-known for using towering fortifications to protect their assets, as well as adopting the use of shields in combat and fighting in a particularly orderly manner.

This particular kingdom is ruled under a heavy hand and wishes to expand by laying the less fortunate to waste - though it is still possible to befriend them.
LanguageData.VFEM2_KingdomRough.label: rough kingdom
LanguageData.VFEM2_KingdomSavage.description:
These people have been here for a shorter period of time than their neolithic bretheren. It is believed that some tribespeople and outlanders had come to embrace the medieval ways of life and decided to unite.

Though still technologically inferior to many other factions, the subjects of this kingdom are well-known for using towering fortifications to protect their assets, as well as adopting the use of shields in combat and fighting in a particularly orderly manner.

This particular kingdom is driven by a warband styled culture; you will not be able to ally with them!
LanguageData.VFEM2_KingdomSavage.label: savage kingdom
LanguageData.VFEM2_MerchantGuild.description:
These people have been here for a shorter period of time than their neolithic brethren. These wandering traders and skilled negotiators form a vast network of traveling caravans and temporary markets. Originating from a loose coalition of outlanders and former city-dwellers, they abandoned static settlements in favor of constant movement, seeking prosperity through commerce rather than conquest.

Unlike most factions, the Guild operates on a pure barter economy—silver halts no value to them, only goods and services do. Their traders travel far and wide, setting up bustling market hubs wherever they stop, offering rare wares and exotic goods in exchange for what they deem useful.

Though they avoid direct conflict and prefer diplomacy, their well-armed guards ensure that their caravans remain safe from opportunistic raiders.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MerchantGuild.label: merchant's guild
LanguageData.VFEM2_PlayerKingdom.label: New Kingdom
LanguageData.VQE_NewVaultPlayerFaction.description: Ein geheim geheim Tresor, der eine mysteriöse Vergangenheit verbirgt.
LanguageData.VQE_NewVaultPlayerFaction.label: Neuer Tresor
